stemHtml: Various types of lightning are associated with cumulonimbus clouds. Which of the following best describes intra-cloud lightning?

options.a: flashes that extend out into the air around the storm but do NOT strike the ground.
options.b: lightning embedded within a cloud that lights up as a sheet of luminosity during the flash.
options.c: long, horizontally travelling flashes, often seen on the underside of stratiform clouds.
options.d: a channel of negative charge which zigzags (moves erratically) downward, in roughly 50 m segments, in a forked pattern.
